events: Kim Gong-ja reaches level up to E Class
Kim Gong-ja develops Aura
Shape of Aura discussed - either fire or blood
Kim Gong-ja challenges 10th floor boss
Bae Hu-ryeong explains Aura shapes based on trauma
Reveals Flame Emperor Yoo Soo-ha's Aura was Fire
skills: Night and Day Fire Caution (A) - revealed in next chapter
deaths: Kim Gong-ja burns to death by Hellfire Maiden's flames
King Goblin killed by Kim Gong-ja after 6 deaths
loops: Kim Gong-ja reveals he used 6 Coins (6 deaths) to defeat King Goblin
Bets Bae Hu-ryeong he can clear 10th floor boss in 2 Coins
Kim Gong-ja's first death to Hellfire Maiden triggers skill copy and regression
cause_effect: Killing monsters and dying allows Kim Gong-ja to copy skills
Kim Gong-ja's trauma determines his Aura shape
Flame Emperor's fire immunity allowed him to easily clear 10th floor
Kim Gong-ja realizes Hellfire Maiden has both fire creation AND fire immunity skills
notes: First appearance of trauma penalty system. Kim Gong-ja levels up from F to E Class. First mention of Sword Saint Marcus' Aura shape being Moonlight.

events: Kim Gong-ja dies in Hellfire Maiden's flames to copy skills
Bae Hu-ryeong reveals boss monster skills before Kim Gong-ja chooses
Kim Gong-ja copies Night and Day Fire Caution (A) instead of Hellfire Trap (S-)
Kim Gong-ja wins bet against Bae Hu-ryeong
First trauma penalty triggered - 'Weak. Hell Road.'
skills: I Want to be Like You (S+)
Night and Day Fire Caution (A) - copied from Hellfire Maiden
deaths: Kim Gong-ja burns to death from hellfire (1st death for 10th floor)
loops: Kim Gong-ja dies and returns 24 hours before
Used 1 Coin out of 2 bet with Bae Hu-ryeong
cause_effect: Because Kim Gong-ja was killed by Hellfire Maiden, he can copy her skills
Because he copied Night and Day Fire Caution, he gains fire immunity
Because he gained fire immunity, he can now survive the hellfire and find the real doll
First trauma penalty appears because Kim Gong-ja reached E Class
notes: Clever strategy: Kim Gong-ja deduces that since fake dolls also don't burn, the boss must have both fire creation and fire immunity skills. First appearance of penalty system 'trauma of enemy being reenacted'.

events: Kim Gong-ja experiences Hellfire Maiden's trauma penalty
Backstory reveals Hellfire Maiden was an orphan girl tortured by a noble
Noble gathered orphans under guise of orphanage but tortured and brainwashed them
Children died in a fire accidentally started by a servant
Kim Gong-ja realizes boss monsters were humans from other worlds
Kim Gong-ja returns to 10th floor and clears it by comforting the dolls
skills: Night and Day Fire Caution (A) - fire immunity
deaths: Hundreds/thousands of orphan children died in the fire (trauma vision)
Hellfire Maiden dies when Kim Gong-ja finds the real doll and comforts her
loops: Kim Gong-ja returns 24 hours before after dying and viewing trauma
Uses fire immunity skill to survive hellfire in next attempt
cause_effect: The noble's cruelty created the Hellfire Maiden's hatred
The accidental fire killed all the children, creating the boss monster
Kim Gong-ja's compassion in finding the real doll allows peaceful resolution instead of just killing
Comforting the doll causes the chains and fire to disappear, clearing the stage
notes: Hidden stage cleared along with normal stage. Kim Gong-ja chooses compassion over brute force, contrasting with Flame Emperor's approach. First indication that boss monsters have tragic backstories.

events: 10th floor clear announced to entire tower with fireworks
Kim Gong-ja becomes E Class and opens 11th floor
Online community erupts with speculation about who cleared 10th floor
Kim Gong-ja tricks doorkeeper again to enter boss room
Doorkeeper tries to get Kim Gong-ja's identity
Multiple guilds arrive to scout Kim Gong-ja at cafe
Count (Rank 3) appears disguised as cat, offers 50,000 Gold and vice leader position
loops: Kim Gong-ja's achievement changes timeline from original
cause_effect: Clearing 10th floor causes tower-wide announcement and opens 11th floor
Kim Gong-ja's anonymity creates massive speculation
Count's appearance means top guilds are competing fiercely for Kim Gong-ja
notes: Kim Gong-ja feels 'on top of the world' for first time. Count is revealed as Rank 3 hunter with metamorphosis skill. Count can transform into animals (cat form shown).

events: Guild recruitment competition for Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja sets conditions: no media leaks until midnight, respect public spaces
Kim Gong-ja negotiates with multiple guilds simultaneously
Count reveals true form and offers 50,000 Gold + vice leader position
Kim Gong-ja realizes his value has increased dramatically
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's 10th floor clear makes him extremely valuable to guilds
His conditions show strategic thinking about media and public perception
Count's high offer establishes baseline for negotiations
notes: Kim Gong-ja drinks caramel macchiato. Count is over 40 but looks 20s due to elixirs. Count is wealthiest person in tower.

events: All top guild masters gather to negotiate for Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja suggests poker game to decide guild membership
Winner gets exclusive rights, loser gets shared membership
Kim Gong-ja uses Bae Hu-ryeong's ability to see cards to cheat
Kim Gong-ja wins poker game against all guild masters
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's poker game strategy allows him to join all guilds equally
By cheating with Bae Hu-ryeong's help, he gains equal status with all guild masters
Heretic Questioner and others suspect cheating but can't prove it
notes: Kim Gong-ja reveals he knows future information about 11th-20th floors being 'Play' themed. Top guild masters' personalities established.

events: Poker game continues, Kim Gong-ja eliminates Venomous Snake
Crusader reveals she knew Kim Gong-ja was cheating but accepts it
Kim Gong-ja faces Black Witch in final round
Kim Gong-ja wins with full house against Witch's flush
Kim Gong-ja gains equal status with all five guilds
skills: Various guild masters' combat abilities discussed
cause_effect: Crusader's acceptance of cheating shows pragmatic approach
Witch's personal backstory (Ukraine, war refugee) revealed
Kim Gong-ja's ambition to clear all floors to 100th revealed
Winning poker game establishes Kim Gong-ja as political equal
notes: Crusader is female (note from translator). Witch reveals she's from Ukraine. Kim Gong-ja reveals his ultimate goal: clear 100th floor.

events: 11th floor opens with countdown and fireworks
Goddess NPC announces end of tutorial
Sword Saint tests if goddess is real by cutting her with sword
Hunters begin 'Transmit' to 11th floor
Kim Gong-ja arrives on 11th floor - large battlefield
Supply Route Defense quest given
Sword Saint leads battle against monster army
skills: Heretic Questioner's Holy Technique: Inner God
Sword Saint's blue Aura sword technique
cause_effect: Clearing 10th floor triggers tutorial end and 11th floor opening
Goddess NPC explains new quest structure
11th floor introduces large-scale warfare instead of individual hunting
notes: Theme of 11th-20th floors is 'Play'/Devil King attack genre. Sword Saint is shown to be pragmatic/cynical about NPCs. Kim Gong-ja gets reward for 10th floor clear.

events: Kim Gong-ja gets 10th floor clear rewards: Blessing of War God (mini map)
Hidden stage reward: Blessing of Human God (NPC directory)
Blessing of Merchant God (chosen item)
Kim Gong-ja chooses Holy Protection Sword (Legendary item)
Kim Gong-ja copies General Sarbast's skill 'Discernment of the Battlefield' by dying
Witch helps Kim Gong-ja teleport to boss monster
Kim Gong-ja kills boss monster with one strike
deaths: Kim Gong-ja asks General Sarbast to kill him (clean cut)
Boss monster (head goblin) killed by Kim Gong-ja
loops: Kim Gong-ja dies to copy NPC skill, returns 24 hours before
Uses copied skill and minimap to efficiently clear 11th floor
cause_effect: Copying NPC skills is possible, expanding Kim Gong-ja's strategy
Holy Protection Sword gives authority over Aegim Empire NPCs
Minimap + NPC directory + Holy Sword = overwhelming tactical advantage
11th floor cleared with minimal casualties due to Kim Gong-ja's leadership
notes: Kim Gong-ja's status window shown: 5 skills. First time copying NPC skill. First legendary item obtained.

events: Kim Gong-ja uses copied battlefield skill and Holy Sword to lead army
Kim Gong-ja uses Goblin High Society skill to confuse goblin boss
11th floor cleared with 0 casualties
Contribution Rank: Kim Gong-ja #1, Sword Saint #2
Top 10 rankers get early access to 12th floor rewards
General Sarbast thanks Kim Gong-ja and asks him to protect empire
deaths: Boss monster (high king goblin) decapitated by Kim Gong-ja
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's combination of skills allows efficient battlefield command
Zero casualties on 11th floor due to his tactics
Early access to 12th floor gives advantage in reward selection
notes: Kim Gong-ja feels 'like flying' from leading army. Bae Hu-ryeong calls him lazy for not training Aura. General Sarbast reveals prophecy about warriors from another world.

events: Top rankers arrive at 12th floor - Imperial Palace of Aegim Empire
Sword Saint immediately attacks Kim Gong-ja
Heretic Questioner blocks Sword Saint's attack
Guild masters unite against Sword Saint
Crusader reveals her Lie Detection skill to mediate
Sword Saint forced to back down
skills: Sword Saint's Detective's Insight (kill count vision)
cause_effect: Sword Saint sees Kim Gong-ja's high kill count (4093) and assumes he's mass murderer
Guild masters protect Kim Gong-ja because of their deal
Crusader's Lie Detection is the only skill Sword Saint trusts
Heretic Questioner uses donated gold to enhance Crusader and Venomous Snake
notes: Sword Saint's kill count vision shows 4093 above Kim Gong-ja's head (from his 4093 suicides/deaths). First major tension between Sword Saint and guilds.

events: Crusader uses Lie Detection to verify truth
Sword Saint questions Kim Gong-ja about kill count
Kim Gong-ja admits to killing one person (Flame Emperor)
Crusader confirms Kim Gong-ja tells truth
Sword Saint apologizes and bows to Kim Gong-ja
Sword Saint reveals his skill: Detective's Insight (B-)
skills: Detective's Insight (B-) - shows opponent's kill count
cause_effect: Crusader's Lie Detection reveals Kim Gong-ja only killed one person (Flame Emperor)
Sword Saint realizes his skill misled him - kill count includes self-deaths
Sword Saint's apology shows his honorable nature
Crusader's skill becomes key to resolving conflict
notes: Flame Emperor had lied about having Lie Detection - it was actually Crusader's skill. Sword Saint reveals his daughter was killed by murderer, explaining his obsession with kill counts.

events: Sword Saint sincerely apologizes to Kim Gong-ja
Kim Gong-ja asks Sword Saint to be his sparring partner
Sword Saint becomes overly affectionate/grandfatherly
Crusader confirms Sword Saint's sincerity with Lie Detection
12th floor rewards appear - Goddess of Protection vs Devil King of Fall Rain
cause_effect: Kim Gong-ja's forgiveness gains Sword Saint's loyalty
Sword Saint's grandfatherly behavior embarrasses Kim Gong-ja
Reward choice creates tension between Goddess and Devil King paths
notes: Sword Saint offers to set Kim Gong-ja up with his granddaughter. Kim Gong-ja is uncomfortable with affection. First appearance of Devil King of Fall Rain reward option.

events: 12th floor rewards revealed: Goddess roles vs Devil King's offer
Devil King offers: kill other top 10 rankers, skip to 99th floor
Bae Hu-ryeong strongly warns against Devil King's offer
Kim Gong-ja considers the offer seriously
Kim Gong-ja ultimately rejects Devil King's offer
skills: Goddess of Protection rewards: Chancellor, Supreme General, etc.
Devil King of Fall Rain reward: skip to 99th floor after killing top 10
cause_effect: Devil King's offer is tempting but Bae Hu-ryeong reveals it's a trap
Bae Hu-ryeong says 99th floor has no boss monster - something worse
Kim Gong-ja's decision to reject shows strategic patience
notes: Flame Emperor likely fell for this trap and failed. Bae Hu-ryeong reveals he died on 99th floor. Kim Gong-ja's curiosity about 99th floor is piqued.

events: Kim Gong-ja formally rejects all 12th floor rewards
Sword Saint chooses 'Grand Master of Aegim Empire'
Other guild masters choose their roles
System reveals someone chose Devil King's reward
Panic and suspicion erupt among hunters
Heretic Questioner kills 3 innocent hunters suspecting betrayal
skills: Heretic Questioner's Holy Technique: Divine Transmission
deaths: 3 innocent hunters killed by Heretic Questioner (8th, 9th, 10th rankers)
cause_effect: Someone choosing Devil King's reward triggers suspicion and paranoia
Heretic Questioner's violent response shows his true nature
Kim Gong-ja's rejection of rewards protects him from being suspect
Crusader's Lie Detection becomes crucial to finding betrayer
notes: First major tragedy in alliance. Devil King's reward creates 'Mafia game' scenario. Kim Gong-ja realizes giving up reward was correct choice.
